### Post by BKK on 2006-07-06
The software updater says there are updates :
login (version 1:4.0.13-7ubuntu3) will be upgraded to version 1:4.0.13-7ubuntu3.1
passwd (version 1:4.0.13-7ubuntu3) will be upgraded to version 1:4.0.13-7ubuntu3.1
ppp (version 2.4.4b1-1ubuntu3) will be upgraded to version 2.4.4b1-1ubuntu3.1
They "can't be authenticated" .... does that mean its not safe to proceeed?

### Post by hda on 2006-07-06

on how to add authentication keys.

### Post by nocturn on 2006-07-06
I've had this problem before.

Try this if you don't mind:

```

sudo -s 
cd /etc/apt/
cp sources.list sources.bak
echo "" >sources.list
aptitude update
cp sources.bak sources.list
aptitude update

```

That fixed it for me.

---
